task:
Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Upgrade Go to 1.26 and Modernize with `go fix`

## Context

The `mcp-todoist` project currently runs on **Go 1.25.7**. Go 1.26 (released February 2026) ships a completely rewritten `go fix` command with 24 modernizer analyzers that automatically transform legacy patterns into idiomatic modern Go. Bumping to 1.26 unlocks the full suite, including the new `errorsastype` and `newexpr` analyzers exclusive to 1.26.

## Codebase Analysis: What `go fix` Will Actually Change

After reading every Go source file, the **primary change** will be the **`any` analyzer** replacing `interface{}` with `any` (~15+ occurrences across the codebase):

| File | Occurrences | Pattern |
|------|------------|---------|
| `internal/todoist/client.go:55` | 1 | `body interface{}` parameter |
| `internal/todoist/projects.go:39,53` | 2 | `map[string]interface{}` params |
| `internal/todoist/tasks.go:52,66` | 2 | `map[string]interface{}` params |
| `internal/todoist/sections.go:30,44` | 2 | `map[string]interface{}` params |
| `internal/todoist/labels.go:25,39` | 2 | `map[string]interface{}` params |
| `internal/todoist/comments.go:33,47` | 2 | `map[string]interface{}` params |
| `internal/tools/tasks.go:122,233` | 2+ | `map[string]interface{}{}` literals |
| `internal/tools/gtd.go:224,260` | 2+ | `map[string]interface{}{}` literals |
| `internal/tools/tools_test.go` | 15+ | `map[string]interface{}{}` in every test |

Other analyzers will likely produce **no changes** because the codebase:
- Has no C-style `for` loops (`rangeint`)
- Has no `HasPrefix`+`TrimPrefix` pairs (`stringscutprefix`)
- Has no `sync.WaitGroup` usage (`waitgroup`)
- Has no `context.WithCancel(context.Background())` in tests (`testingcontext`)
- Has no struct-typed fields with `omitempty` — all are primitives/pointers (`omitzero`)
- Already uses `strings.Builder` correctly (`stringsbuilder`)
- Has no `sort.Slice`, `reflect.TypeOf`, `// +build` constraints, etc.

## Steps

### Step 1: Bump
